strengths: Built and contributed to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq using MCP frameworks, demonstrating direct production experience with agentic workflows beyond prototypes.

Proven track record in high-scale distributed systems at Dunnhumby (millions of req/sec) and Optilyz, with deep expertise in event-driven architecture, real-time inference, and low-latency backend systems using DLang and Node.js.

Founded and sustained GISCollective for 8+ years as an open-source, Kubernetes-deployable event-driven platform — showcasing architectural independence, long-term system ownership, and community-driven engineering discipline.
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 raises questions about recent active technical engagement and market alignment.
Limited explicit evidence of financial regulatory compliance experience or direct fintech infrastructure exposure (e.g., credit risk, working capital systems) in prior roles.
No documented experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or governing hybrid external engineering models, a core requirement for the role.
response.justification: Bogdan brings rare, demonstrable production experience building agentic AI workflows and high-scale, event-driven backend systems — directly aligning with the core technical demands of the role — while his open-source leadership and systems thinking reveal deep architectural discipline; his lack of explicit fintech or team-scaling pedigree is offset by proven ability to architect complex, reliable systems under real-world constraints, suggesting strong potential to rapidly absorb domain context and lead technical execution.
